text: Hot flashes are a common symptom of perimenopause caused by hormonal changes. Cooling techniques, hydration, and stress reduction can help. 🌡️💧
During menopause, sleep can be disrupted. Avoid caffeine after 3 PM, create a dark cool room, and practice relaxation before bed. 😴
Women over 40 should focus on protein-rich diets, regular movement, and stress management to maintain energy and hormone balance. 🍳🏋️‍♀️
Mood swings in perimenopause are often linked to fluctuating estrogen. Deep breathing, journaling, and regular exercise can stabilize mood. 🧘📓
